name: Major Riot
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a monster(s) you control returns to your hand by an opponent's card effect: Return as many monsters on the field to the hand as possible, then each player Special Summons monsters from their hand, in face-down Defense Position, equal to the number of Monster Cards that were returned to their hand.
eff: If a monster(s) you control returns to your hand by an opponent's card effect: Return as many monsters on the field to the hand as possible, then each player Special Summons monsters from their hand, in face-down Defense Position, equal to the number of Monster Cards that were returned to their hand.

action: Activates if returned from the field to the hand
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's hand to your opponent's field
Sets from your opponent's hand to your opponent's field
